parts.text:
Generate a 2D sprite for a barracks tower (兵营塔) for a tower defense game. 

Requirements:
- Use the generate_sprite tool with model "huoshan_seedream"
- Prompt: "Top-down view of a medieval barracks tower for tower defense game, cartoon style similar to Kingdom Rush, stone building with blue roof and a small flag on top, simple clean design with bold colors, game asset icon style, white background, no shadow"
- Save as: "barracks_tower" in Assets/Art/Towers/
- Size: 512x512
- Make sure to activate the unity-sprite-generation skill first, then follow its workflow
- After generation, verify the sprite is imported correctly
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
